items.claim: Conor McGregor is currently in a healthier, less bitter mental state compared to his previous fights.
items.quote: I do think whatever it is it it is working I do feel like he's distanced himself from it and he seems at a healthy place.

items.claim: Conor McGregor will have an increased damage threshold at 170 pounds due to carrying more mass.
items.quote: I think his damage threshold will go up, which is something that in the past has cost him.

items.claim: Conor McGregor has a significant experience advantage at 170 pounds having fought there twice before.
items.quote: He's got an experience advantage over Max at 170. He's 2 and 0.

items.claim: Max Holloway has no experience competing at 170 pounds.
items.quote: Max Holloway has no idea how his body is going to feel in the octagon on Saturday night. He has no idea. So far he's done it at 45 55, but 70 is is a different beast.

items.claim: Conor McGregor's gas tank will be improved at 170 pounds because he is not enduring the weight cut to 155.
items.quote: I think he'll have a bigger gas tank at 170. The cuts were really were really destroying him and and really zapping his gas tank.

items.claim: Max Holloway will have a cardio advantage over Conor McGregor in a five-round fight.
items.quote: I still think Max will have a cardio advantage

items.claim: Conor McGregor's increased weight at 170 pounds will negatively impact his cardio in the later rounds of a fight.
items.quote: I just don't feel like Connor's weight is going to be able to keep up in that particular scenario.
